channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. Princess Peach's Super Mario Galaxy Movie Lineage Is Canon, Says Miyamoto  GameSpot
  2. Miyamoto wants to adhere to Peach's backstory in The Super Mario Galaxy Movie in future games  Nintendo Everything
  3. Nintendo avoided making original movies for a long time because “establishing canon character backstories could be a constraint in game development,” according to Shigeru Miyamoto  AUTOMATON
  4. Sounds Like Nintendo's Super Mario Galaxy Movie Backstory for Princess Peach Is Now Video Game Canon, Too  IGN
  5. The Super Mario Galaxy Movie’s Weird Twist About Peach Could Be Canon  PopGeeks

item.title: Framework’s Laptop 13 Pro Is No MacBook, but It’s Making PCs Better for Everyone - Gizmodo
item.description:
1. Framework’s Laptop 13 Pro Is No MacBook, but It’s Making PCs Better for Everyone  Gizmodo
  2. Framework Has a Better, More Take-Apartable Laptop  WIRED
  3. Framework’s CEO on the RAM crisis and creating a “MacBook Pro for Linux users”  Ars Technica
  4. Framework announces Laptop 13 Pro, ‘the MacBook Pro for Linux users’  The Verge
  5. Framework is building an eGPU kit for its Laptop 16  Engadget

item.title: Fallout: New Vegas dev claims Bethesda made a PowerPoint of everything Obsidian did 'wrong' - Polygon.com
item.description:
1. Fallout: New Vegas dev claims Bethesda made a PowerPoint of everything Obsidian did 'wrong'  Polygon.com
  2. Bethesda doesn’t have ‘the engineering know-how’ to remaster Fallout New Vegas, former Obsidian CCO says  Video Games Chronicle
  3. Fallout: New Vegas designer says don't hold your breath for an Oblivion-style remaster: "I don't think Bethesda has the engineering knowhow"  GamesRadar+
  4. Fallout: New Vegas Dev Pours Cold Water on Remaster Rumors: “They Have No Idea How to Reassemble It”  Wccftech
  5. Fallout: New Vegas' DLC Was Meant To To Set Up Sequel Game  80 Level
